title: Evaluate promptfoo or inspect-ai for agent eval framework
description: The EVOLVE phase compares traces vs skill files but has no structured eval framework. Tools like promptfoo (already referenced in tests/prompts/promptfoo.yaml) and inspect-ai provide standardized eval runs with regression detection. Investigate whether either can replace the ad-hoc quality scoring in evaluator.py.
requirements: Prototype a basic eval config for one research agent
done_criteria: A working promptfoo or inspect-ai config that evals one agent
Comparison doc: current approach vs proposed framework
context: tests/prompts/promptfoo.yaml already exists but appears unused. This could be the foundation for structured evals.
